novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Did not die in 209, as presented by the novel. Rather, she died shortly before Liu Bei did. [SGZ]
	Was rescued alongside Liu Shan at Changban by Zhao Yun. [SGZ]

full_text:
Lady Gan 甘夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Gan (甘夫人)was born in Pei. Concubine and later Empress of Liu Bei. She was a native of Pei. Lady Gan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Lady Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
